exhibits.name: List of State Administrators/Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: 14 states with administrators and/or agents for service of process.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.auditor: Morse & Co., Consultants & Certified Public Accountants
notes_topics: Note 1: Summary of Significant Accounting Policies (Nature, Cash, Receivables, Intangibles, Leases, Revenue Recognition, Income Taxes, Estimates, Change in Accounting Principle ASU 2016-13, Subsequent Events)
Note 2: Related Party Transactions (KDKC admin fees, advances)
exhibits.rendering_note: All financial statement pages are scanned images with no text layer. Rendered via pdftoppm at 300 DPI for extraction.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 57 pages. Includes personal guaranty via Attachment 3 (Owners Agreement).

exhibits.name: Franchise Disclosure Questionnaire
exhibits.notes: Not to be used in certain registration states. Includes 13+ questions about franchisee's receipt and understanding of FDD.

exhibits.name: Confidential Operations Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Computer Operations (50 pages) and Training (73 pages) are the largest sections.

exhibits.name: List of Current and Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 8 franchisee entries cover 17 outlets (some multi-outlet). 2 former franchisees (Dvorak — transferred KS/MO; Adcock — reacquired OK/TX). No gag clause in last 3 fiscal years.

exhibits.name: State Addenda and Agreement Riders
exhibits.notes: 20 pages covering 16 states. Material overrides to forum selection, choice of law, noncompete, general release, termination, and other provisions.

exhibits.name: Contracts for use with the Cookie Advantage Franchise

sub_exhibits.name: System Protection Agreement
sub_exhibits.notes: Noncompete and confidentiality agreement for Designated Managers and non-equity officers

sub_exhibits.name: Lease Addendum
sub_exhibits.notes: Includes franchisor access, assignment, default/notice provisions. Attachment 1 for lease terms.

exhibits.notes: 6 sub-exhibits covering release, noncompete, confidentiality, assignment, lease, and payment.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: All 12 states listed as 'Pending' effective date.

exhibits.name: Receipt
exhibits.notes: Detachable receipt in duplicate (franchisee copy + franchisor copy). Lists all exhibits A-J.
